name: Cinderswallow Urn
explicitMods: +13 to Maximum Charges
Recharges 5 Charges when you Consume an Ignited corpse
15% of Damage Taken from Hits is Leeched as Life during Effect
Enemies Ignited by you during Effect take 8% increased Damage
Recover 2% of Mana when you Kill an Enemy during Effect
descrText: Right click to drink. Can only hold charges while in belt. Refills as you kill monsters.
flavourText: A controlled burn is sometimes necessary for new life.

socketedItems.secDescrText: Supports spell skills, making their effect reoccur when cast. Cannot support skills with cooldowns, triggered skills, Brand skills, Vaal skills, channelling skills, skills with a reservation, or skills used by totems, traps, or mines. Cannot modify the skills of minions.
explicitMods:
Supported Spells gain a Seal every 0.68 seconds, to a maximum of 4 Seals
Supported Spells are Unsealed when cast, and their effects Reoccur for each Seal lost
Supported Skills deal 33% less Damage when Reoccurring
socketedItems.descrText: This is a Support Gem. It does not grant a bonus to your character, but to skills in sockets connected to it. Place into an item socket connected to a socket containing the Skill Gem you wish to augment. Right click to remove from a socket.
flavourText: "True power grows with patience. You must nurture it.
You learn what it needs. You provide. You wait. Only
then, when it is ripe, does it yield its fruits."

name: Corpse Fist
implicitMods: 20% of Physical Damage Converted to Lightning Damage
explicitMods: +31 to Intelligence
+4 to maximum Life
+51 to maximum Mana
+48% to Cold Resistance
+34% to Chaos Resistance
45% increased Damage with Hits against Chilled Enemies

socketedItems.secDescrText: Curses a single enemy, increasing the damage they take from projectiles, and making projectiles split when hitting them, to hit other targets around them. You can only have one Mark at a time.
explicitMods: Cursed enemies take 34% increased Damage from Projectile Hits
Projectiles which Hit Cursed Enemies Split towards 2 additional targets
socketedItems.descrText: Place into an item socket of the right colour to gain this skill. Right click to remove from a socket.

socketedItems.secDescrText: Supports mark curse skills.
explicitMods: 16% reduced Effect of Marks from Supported Skills
Trigger Supported Skill when you Hit a Rare or Unique Enemy with an Attack

name: The Fledgling
explicitMods: 170% increased Armour and Evasion
44% increased Projectile Speed
33% increased Projectile Damage
Projectiles cannot collide with Enemies in Close Range
Far Shot
flavourText: The single well-placed arrow that changes the world
must be preceded by ten thousand practice shots.

socketedItems.secDescrText: Grants a buff providing fire damage based on your physical damage. While you have this buff, if you kill an enemy, other enemies near them will be burned based on the overkill damage. The burn inflicted by this skill can only be affected by modifiers to damage over time (burning damage is damage over time).
explicitMods: Base duration is 4.00 seconds
Base Burning Damage is 30% of Overkill Damage
38% more Burning Damage
Buff grants 20% of your Physical Damage as Extra Fire Damage
socketedItems.descrText: Place into an item socket of the right colour to gain this skill. Right click to remove from a socket.

properties.name: Attack, Melee, AoE, Movement, Travel, Physical

socketedItems.secDescrText: Charges at a targeted location or enemy, pushing away enemies in your path and repeatedly dealing off-hand damage in a small area in front of you. You deal damage in a larger area when you reach the target. The further you travel, the more damage you deal, and the greater your chance of stunning enemies.
explicitMods: 202 to 302 Base Off Hand Physical Damage
7 to 12 Added Physical Damage per 15 Armour or Evasion Rating on Shield
75% increased Stun Threshold reduction on enemies at Maximum charge distance
100% more Damage with Hits at Maximum Charge Distance
127% increased Movement Speed
socketedItems.descrText: Place into an item socket of the right colour to gain this skill. Right click to remove from a socket.

socketedItems.secDescrText: Performs a series of quick teleports towards a targeted location. If using the "Attack in Place" option, the direction is reversed. Shares a cooldown with other Blink skills.
explicitMods: This Spell's Cast Speed cannot be modified
socketedItems.descrText: Place into an item socket of the right colour to gain this skill. Right click to remove from a socket.

socketedItems.secDescrText: Casts an aura that causes nearby enemies to take more physical damage.
explicitMods: +0.1 metres to radius

Nearby Enemies take at least 15% more Physical Damage,
 raising up to 30% as they stay in the Aura for 4 seconds
socketedItems.descrText: Place into an item socket of the right colour to gain this skill. Right click to remove from a socket.

name: Oriath's End
explicitMods: 22% increased Charge Recovery
Enemies you Kill during Effect have a 30% chance to Explode, dealing a tenth of their maximum Life as Damage of a Random Element
descrText: Right click to drink. Can only hold charges while in belt. Refills as you kill monsters.
flavourText: Ennui prevailed, until inspiration sparked
a mote of flame, kindled by fury
and all in his path were obliterated.

name: Death Rush
explicitMods: Recover 3% of Life on Kill
Gain Adrenaline for 3 seconds on Kill
flavourText: To truly appreciate life you must be there when it ends

name: Malachai's Loop
explicitMods: 229% increased Energy Shield
+2 to Maximum Power Charges
20% chance to gain a Power Charge on Hit
16% increased Spell Damage per Power Charge
Lose all Power Charges on reaching Maximum Power Charges
Shocks you when you reach Maximum Power Charges
flavourText: Thaumaturgy has no limit.
It is our fragile reality that imposes boundaries.

socketedItems.secDescrText: Adds a buff that deals Physical Damage over time, while increasing Attack Speed and Life Leech. Killing an enemy while this buff is active refreshes the buff duration, and can grant a Frenzy Charge.
explicitMods: Base duration is 10.80 seconds
Grants 20% increased Attack Speed
1.2% of Attack Physical Damage Leeched as Life
You take 4% of your Maximum Life per second as Physical Damage
You take 4% of your Maximum Energy Shield per second as Physical Damage
25% chance to gain a Frenzy Charge on Kill
socketedItems.descrText: Place into an item socket of the right colour to gain this skill. Right click to remove from a socket.

socketedItems.secDescrText: Places a Sigil on the ground, which grants a buff to you and allies in the area around it for a duration. The Sigil gains stages as you spend mana in its area, making the buff more powerful. You can only have one Sigil of Power at a time.
explicitMods: Base duration is 12.00 seconds
Gains a Stage when you Spend a total of 400 Mana while in Area
Enemies in Area deal 19% less Damage while at maximum Stages
Maximum 4 Stages
Buff grants 7 to 141 Added Lightning Damage per Stage
Minimum 1 second between Stages
socketedItems.descrText: Place into an item socket of the right colour to gain this skill. Right click to remove from a socket.

name: Headhunter
explicitMods: +55 to Strength
+54 to Dexterity
+54 to maximum Life
22% increased Damage with Hits against Rare monsters
When you Kill a Rare monster, you gain its Modifiers for 60 seconds
flavourText: "A man's soul rules from a cavern of bone, learns and
judges through flesh-born windows. The heart is meat.
The head is where the Man is."
- Lavianga, Advisor to Kaom

name: Badge of the Brotherhood
explicitMods: Your Maximum Frenzy Charges is equal to your Maximum Power Charges
10% increased Cooldown Recovery Rate of Travel Skills per Frenzy Charge
8% increased Effect of Elusive on you per Power Charge
23% chance to lose a Frenzy Charge when you use a Travel Skill
21% chance to lose a Power Charge when you gain Elusive
flavourText: Greater than any blade, agility and intellect will be your weapons.

name: Nimis
explicitMods: +37 to Dexterity
25% increased Projectile Damage
Projectiles Return to you
Projectiles are fired in random directions
flavourText: Too much of something is bad enough;
too much of nothing is just as tough.

name: Dying Sun
explicitMods: 148% increased Charges per use
55% less Duration
20% increased Area of Effect during Effect
Skills fire 2 additional Projectiles during Effect
descrText: Right click to drink. Can only hold charges while in belt. Refills as you kill monsters.
flavourText: All things must die.
Whether you burn out or explode is up to you.

name: The Wise Oak
explicitMods: During Effect, 6% reduced Damage taken of each Element for which your Uncapped Elemental Resistance is lowest
During Effect, Damage Penetrates 8% Resistance of each Element for which your Uncapped Elemental Resistance is highest
descrText: Right click to drink. Can only hold charges while in belt. Refills as you kill monsters.
flavourText: The summer sun dries the soil and burns the leaves.
The autumn rain extinguishes the flames.
The spring bloom shades the wet earth.
Nature is an eternal tug of war.

name: Corruption Shell
explicitMods: Ignore Stuns while using Socketed Attack Skills
Socketed Attacks have -20 to Total Mana Cost
+31 to maximum Energy Shield
9% increased Area of Effect
24% increased Stun and Block Recovery
Reflects 14 Physical Damage to Melee Attackers
Enemies you Kill have a 33% chance to Explode, dealing a tenth of their maximum Life as Physical Damage

socketedItems.secDescrText: Supports projectile skills, and any other skills that chain.
explicitMods: Supported Skills Chain +1 times
Supported Skills have 36% increased Chaining range
Supported Skills Chain 50% more times
socketedItems.descrText: This is a Support Gem. It does not grant a bonus to your character, but to skills in sockets connected to it. Place into an item socket connected to a socket containing the Skill Gem you wish to augment. Right click to remove from a socket.
flavourText: "We are all connected. Each of us burns with the same fire.
Queen Hyrri knew that... she chooses to battle still, somewhere
beyond Hinekora's sight. There must be a very good reason."

socketedItems.secDescrText: Supports projectile skills, making their projectiles fork into two projectiles the first two times they hit an enemy and don't pierce it.
explicitMods: Projectiles from Supported Skills Fork
Projectiles from Supported Skills can Fork an additional Time

Projectiles from Supported Skills have 50% chance for an additional
Projectile when Forking
socketedItems.descrText: This is a Support Gem. It does not grant a bonus to your character, but to skills in sockets connected to it. Place into an item socket connected to a socket containing the Skill Gem you wish to augment. Right click to remove from a socket.
flavourText: Lioneye earned his moniker by killing
three men with a single arrow.

socketedItems.descrText: This is a Support Gem. It does not grant a bonus to your character, but to skills in sockets connected to it. Place into an item socket connected to a socket containing the Skill Gem you wish to augment. Right click to remove from a socket.

explicitMods: Supported Skills have 49% increased Area of Effect

socketedItems.descrText: This is a Support Gem. It does not grant a bonus to your character, but to skills in sockets connected to it. Place into an item socket connected to a socket containing the Skill Gem you wish to augment. Right click to remove from a socket.

socketedItems.secDescrText: Fires a projectile from a Wand that causes a series of area explosions in a secondary radius around its point of impact, each damaging enemies.
explicitMods: Kinetic Blast creates 5 additional explosions
Increases and Reductions to Spell Damage also apply to Attack Damage from this Skill at 200% of their value
35% less Area Damage
Base explosion radius is 1.4 metres
Base secondary radius is 2 metres

socketedItems.secDescrText: Supports any skill that hits enemies.

socketedItems.descrText: This is a Support Gem. It does not grant a bonus to your character, but to skills in sockets connected to it. Place into an item socket connected to a socket containing the Skill Gem you wish to augment. Right click to remove from a socket.

name: Atziri's Promise
explicitMods: Gain 8% of Elemental Damage as Extra Chaos Damage during effect
2% of Chaos Damage Leeched as Life during Effect
Gain 8% of Physical Damage as Extra Chaos Damage during effect
descrText: Right click to drink. Can only hold charges while in belt. Refills as you kill monsters.
flavourText: "Death needs not your understanding. It needs only your loyalty."
- Atziri, Queen of the Vaal

name: Ralakesh's Impatience
explicitMods: +18% to Cold Resistance
+25% to Chaos Resistance
16% increased Movement Speed
Corrupted Blood cannot be inflicted on you
Count as having maximum number of Power Charges
flavourText: The Master of a Million Faces lived by one
simple ethos: why make the effort, when
you can simply mimic what others have?

Supports skills with cooldowns.
Cannot support triggered skills.

socketedItems.secDescrText: Reserves mana to apply a buff and leave afterimages of your recent past. Cast the spell again to return to the oldest afterimage, teleporting to that location as well as resetting your Life, Mana and Energy Shield to the values they had then.

This Spell's Cast Speed cannot be modified
Buff makes you Unaffected by Temporal Chains

a sinister shaft surreptitiously shot slays a scoundrel.
I will see them again, but not until my work is done.
